overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's neon-lit streets at dusk. The player moves through urban canyons with massive digital billboards, crosses intersections, and passes various storefronts and futuristic architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway structure, passing digital billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large metal highway structure spanning overhead with visible support beams
building facade covered in large glowing digital advertisements and news screens
bright orange concrete barriers separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a walk along a concrete sidewalk sheltered beneath an elevated highway. The left side features a building covered in large digital billboards displaying advertisements, while orange barriers line the right side separating the walkway from the street where sparse traffic moves.

events.description: exiting covered sidewalk and entering open intersection area
turning left while crossing the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left to follow the crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall building with dark brick facade and vertical advertising banners
floating hexagonal digital sign displaying white graphics
wide pedestrian crossing with yellow striped markings

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered sidewalk and approaches an open intersection. A historic brick building with vertical banners rises on the left, while a floating hexagonal holographic sign marks the center of the intersection. The player crosses the street, turning left while a car passes through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial canyon with towering digital billboards

events.description: waiting for vehicle to pass before continuing across side street

agents.ego_description: walking down the street surrounded by towering buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and digital screens

tall vertical structure with bright red neon lighting and geometric patterns
large blue and red neon sign reading CIRCUS on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking through a canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards. A prominent vertical red neon pillar rises in the distance, while the CIRCUS bar sign glows on the right. The player crosses a side street, pausing briefly for traffic, as the elevated highway structure remains visible overhead to the left.

events.description: car passes by on the right while walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past a corner convenience store with glowing vending machines and parked cars along the street

pair of glowing green vending machines on the sidewalk
line of parked vehicles along the left side of the street
pile of garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a street corner featuring a convenience store with bright neon trim and glowing green vending machines. Parked cars line the left side of the street while trash bags sit on the right sidewalk. A pedestrian stands near the vending machines as the player continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern glass building facade with industrial piping

events.description: turning right at the street corner to follow the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and walking along a modern building with red neon accents and large industrial pipes

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench against the building wall

entered.detail: tall building with dark glass windows and reflective surfaces
horizontal rows of bright red neon lighting strips on building facade
large cylindrical pipes running along the exterior of the building
concrete bench on the sidewalk with a person sitting

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the corner, leaving the main neon district behind. The new path follows a modern glass building adorned with horizontal red neon strips and large industrial pipes running overhead. A person sits on a bench along the wall as the player continues walking under the elevated highway structure now centered overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched canyons of a futuristic city. It begins along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, flanked by glowing digital billboards on one side and orange traffic barriers on the other. As the camera moves forward, it exits the cover of the highway to cross an open intersection marked by a floating hexagonal hologram and a historic brick building with vertical banners. The scene then opens up into a dense corridor of skyscrapers, where the lighting shifts toward vibrant reds and neons as the camera passes the glowing CIRCUS bar sign. Finally, the movement continues across a side street toward a prominent red neon pillar rising in the distance, while the overhead highway structure recedes into the urban skyline.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit street corner into a more industrial urban corridor. It begins by passing a convenience store defined by bright neon trim and glowing green vending machines, moving past parked cars and scattered trash bags on the sidewalk. As the camera reaches the corner, it turns right and leaves the main neon district behind, shifting the focus toward a modern glass building accented with horizontal red neon strips. The scene then expands to reveal large industrial pipes running overhead before the camera continues forward, passing a seated pedestrian and moving directly under the heavy shadow of an elevated highway structure.
